program: Business English — Desbloqueio para Lideranca em Oncologia
hub_subtitle: Desbloqueio Comunicativo para Liderança em Oncologia Internacional

lesson.menu_desc: Looking ahead with the team: will vs going to -- make predictions, offers and promises, and talk about the next steps for the Parque Global -- 31 slides
lesson.subtitle: Aula 18 -- Talking About Plans & the Future
lesson.title_tag: Professor View -- Fernando Varela | Aula 18 -- Talking About Plans & the Future

listenings.text: Hi Fernando, this is Sarah. Great to see you in Chicago. Here is the plan for the Parque Global. We are going to open the new oncology unit in March. The construction is almost ready, and I think it will be a big success. I expect a lot of patients in the first year. My team will send you the timeline this week. I promise we will support you at every step. Let us talk about the next steps tomorrow. Thank you, and have a good evening.

Hi Sarah, this is Fernando. Thank you for the plan. I am going to present it to my team in Sao Paulo next week. I think they will like it. I am sure the Parque Global will be ready on time. I will send you my comments on the timeline tomorrow. I probably will need two more people for the project. I promise I will keep you updated. Talk soon.
